name: ai-playground
description: A collection of Claude plugins for developer productivity.

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Commits current git changes using a configurable, structured commit message format. Supports Conventional Commits, simple single-line, and fully custom templates. Auto-stages changes by default and guides you through writing a good commit message.

plugins.name: personality
plugins.description: Learns your coding style from the delta between Claude's suggestions and what you actually commit. Builds a transparent, editable PERSONALITY.md that gets silently injected into every prompt so Claude knows your style before writing a single line.

plugins.name: brainstorm
plugins.description: A brainstorming and idea refinement skill — like a brilliant, curious friend who helps you think things through. Asks sharp questions, brings examples, challenges assumptions, and lands on a concrete concept with an honest recommendation.
